---
title: "Regional Development"
subtitle: "Theories, strategies, and spatial patterns of regional planning and development."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

{{< include regional-development/00-syllabus.md >}}

---

Welcome to the **Regional Development** module of Geography OpenCourseWare.

---

## Part A: Common Topics (NEP-2020 & UGC NET)

These topics are covered in both the NEP-2020 undergraduate syllabus and the UGC NET syllabus.

{{< include regional-development/01-concept-and-types-of-regions.md >}}

{{< include regional-development/02-delineation-of-regions.md >}}

{{< include regional-development/03-development-indicators-disparities.md >}}

{{< include regional-development/04-theories-of-regional-development-1.md >}}

{{< include regional-development/05-theories-of-regional-development-2.md >}}

{{< include regional-development/06-regional-planning-india.md >}}

---

## Part B: NEP-2020 Specific Topics

These topics are part of the NEP-2020 undergraduate programme only.

{{< include regional-development/07-urban-planning-ncr.md >}}

---

## Part C: UGC NET Specific Topics

These topics are part of the UGC NET syllabus only.

{{< include regional-development/08-dependency-world-systems.md >}}

{{< include regional-development/09-social-movements-regional-development.md >}}

---


---

## Quick Reference

{{< include regional-development/14-quick-reference.md >}}

---
